metadata.title: Canadian Retail Banking - Savings Products Data
metadata.disclaimer: Rates and conditions subject to change without notice. Verify all details with each institution before making financial decisions. Not financial advice. Some conditions marked 'Unverified' could not be confirmed from official sources — check directly with the bank.

bank_of_canada_rate.notes: BoC held at 2.25% since Oct 2025. Next decision March 18, 2026 — markets expect hold.

validation_flags.message: Post-promo base rate of 0.30% is estimated — Simplii does not prominently publish this figure
validation_flags.resolution: Conservative estimate based on previous runs and similar CIBC subsidiary patterns

validation_flags.message: Multiple sources show different rates: 0.45% vs 0.85%. Using 0.85%.

accounts.base_rate_note: Standard posted rate after promo period
accounts.promo_details: 4.60% for first 3 months on new accounts. Some sources show 4.70% — may vary by channel. Offer expires June 9, 2026.
accounts.e_transfer_notes: Interac e-Transfer costs $1 per transfer from this account.
accounts.joint_account_notes: Joint accounts available. Transfers include sole and joint ownership RBC accounts.
features: Unlimited free transfers to RBC accounts
1 free withdrawal/month; $5 per additional at branch/ATM
new_features: New promo: 4.60% for 3 months on new accounts (expires June 9, 2026)
accounts.debit_transactions: 1 free withdrawal/month. $5 fee per additional withdrawal at branch/ATM. Online transfers to other RBC accounts are free and unlimited.

accounts.base_rate_note: Very basic everyday savings rate
accounts.e_transfer_notes: Interac e-Transfer via linked chequing account; $1 per transfer
features: e-Transfer via linked chequing account ($1 fee)
accounts.debit_transactions: Free unlimited debit transactions

accounts.base_rate_note: Tiered rate structure based on balance
accounts.e_transfer_notes: Interac e-Transfer via linked chequing account
features: No monthly fees if $5K+ balance; $4/month otherwise
accounts.debit_transactions: Standard debit transaction access

accounts.base_rate_note: Typical Big 5 base savings rate
features: Free transfers to other TD accounts
accounts.debit_transactions: Free unlimited online transfers to TD accounts. Branch/ATM withdrawals may incur fees.

accounts.base_rate_note: Up to 0.85% on balances $10,000+. Some sources show 0.45% — rate may have been updated. Using higher confirmed figure.
accounts.e_transfer_notes: Interac e-Transfer incurs $5 transaction fee. Use online transfer to TD chequing first (free), then e-Transfer from there.
accounts.joint_account_notes: Joint accounts available. No specific restrictions found — verify with TD.

rate_tiers.note: Interest on full balance when $10K+ maintained

accounts.debit_transactions: $5 per debit transaction (ATM withdrawals, bill payments, debit purchases). Free: online transfers to other TD accounts via EasyWeb/app, pre-authorized transfers. Non-TD ATM: $2 Canada, $3 US/Mexico, $5 international.
features: Unlimited free self-serve transfers to TD accounts
$5 per debit transaction (ATM, bill pay, debit purchase)
Free: online transfers to other TD accounts
Non-TD ATM fees: $2 Canada, $3 US/Mexico, $5 international

verification.contradiction_note: Some sources show 0.45%, others 0.85%. Using 0.85% per most recent sources. Verify at td.com/ca.

accounts.base_rate_note: Up to 1.50% on balances $500K+. Tiered relationship-based rate.

rate_tiers.note: High-balance tier. Relationship rate up to 2.75% for $250K+ with linked accounts.

features: Relationship bump available with linked TD products
accounts.debit_transactions: Withdrawal and transaction fees vary by tier. Free online transfers to TD accounts. Verify specific fees at td.com.

accounts.base_rate_note: Posted rate on all deposits without promo. Up to 1.90% without promo conditions (some sources).
accounts.promo_details: 4.50% total (0.50% posted + 4.00% promo bonus) for first 120 days on new accounts. Balances up to $1M. As of March 2, 2026.
accounts.joint_account_notes: Joint accounts available. Only one promotional interest rate offer per joint account.

rate_tiers.note: Flat posted rate on all balances

features: Unlimited free self-serve transfers to BMO accounts
Cannot be included with BMO bank plans
new_features: Promo: 4.50% total for 120 days on new accounts (posted + 4.00% bonus)
accounts.debit_transactions: Free unlimited self-serve transfers to BMO accounts. $5 fee for: in-branch withdrawals, pre-authorized debits, telephone banking transfers.

accounts.base_rate_note: Up to 2.50% when balance increases by $200+/month. Otherwise lower.

rate_tiers.note: Base rate if monthly deposit condition not met
Bonus rate for meeting savings condition

features: Rewards consistent saving with higher rate
Must grow balance by $200+/month for best rate
1 free transaction per month; fees for additional
accounts.debit_transactions: 1 free transaction per month. Additional transactions incur fees.

accounts.base_rate_note: Very basic near-zero interest rate
accounts.debit_transactions: Standard debit transaction access

accounts.base_rate_note: Regular interest rate after welcome bonus period
accounts.promo_details: 4.65% for 90-day premium period. Up to 4.75% with Ultimate Package, 4.70% with Preferred Package. Welcome bonus 4.05% for first 3 months for new clients.
accounts.joint_account_notes: Joint accounts available. Joint accounts eligible for welcome bonus (one per account).
features: Higher rates with Preferred/Ultimate banking packages
IMPORTANT: Withdrawal during Premium Period forfeits accrued Premium Interest and restarts the timer
new_features: Welcome bonus: 4.05% for new clients for first 3 months
Premium period rates available: 4.65% for 90 days
accounts.debit_transactions: Free unlimited self-serve transfers (online/mobile/phone). $5 fee per in-branch transaction. WARNING: Debit transaction before Premium Period end-date forfeits accrued Premium Interest and restarts the period.

accounts.base_rate_note: Basic everyday savings rate
accounts.debit_transactions: Standard debit transaction access

accounts.base_rate_note: Up to 0.10% tiered rate
accounts.debit_transactions: Standard debit transaction access

accounts.base_rate_note: Tiered rate 0.30%-0.60% based on balance. Highest tier shown. +0.25% Smart Interest when saving $200+/month.
accounts.promo_details: 4.60% for first 3 months for new customers
accounts.joint_account_notes: Joint accounts available. Smart Interest calculated separately per accountholder configuration (sole vs joint).

rate_tiers.note: Smart Interest bonus on balances up to $200K

features: Smart Interest calculated separately for sole vs joint accounts

verification.contradiction_note: Exact tier breakpoints not publicly shown. Range confirmed as 0.30%-0.60%. Smart Interest +0.25% confirmed.

accounts.debit_transactions: $5 fee for CIBC ATM withdrawals. Smart Interest: need to save $200+/month across eAdvantage accounts with same accountholders. Interest payments and CIBC fees don't count toward balance growth.

accounts.base_rate_note: Unverified — check cibc.com
accounts.debit_transactions: Standard debit transaction access

accounts.base_rate_note: Base rate 1.00%. Up to 2.75% with qualifying direct deposit of $2,000+/month.
accounts.joint_account_notes: Joint accounts available. Each co-holder has full access — can deposit/withdraw without other holder's permission. Direct deposit bonus applies to joint accounts. CDIC insured separately for joint accounts.
features: Also available as TFSA and RRSP
new_features: Base rate reduced from previous levels. DD bonus structure now key differentiator.
EQ Bank continues to top Ratehub, NerdWallet, and MoneySense 'best HISA' rankings for 2026.
accounts.debit_transactions: No transaction fees. Unlimited free Interac e-Transfers. Unlimited free bill payments. No withdrawal restrictions.

accounts.base_rate_note: 30-day notice: 2.75%. 10-day notice: 2.35%. Requires notice period before withdrawal.
accounts.e_transfer_notes: Transfers to EQ Personal Account, then e-Transfer
accounts.joint_account_notes: Joint accounts available. Funds can be transferred to joint or personal accounts after notice period.
features: Higher rate in exchange for notice period
Withdrawals can be cancelled before transfer date — no penalty
new_features: Notice Savings Account continues as EQ Bank's premium savings option
accounts.debit_transactions: Unlimited withdrawals, but each withdrawal has a pending period (10 or 30 days depending on account type). Withdrawals can be cancelled before transfer date with no penalty.

accounts.base_rate_note: Same as Personal Account base rate
accounts.cdic_notes: CDIC insured separately for TFSA holdings
features: Direct deposit bonus may not apply
Not available as standalone in Quebec
accounts.debit_transactions: Standard debit transaction access

accounts.base_rate_note: Unverified — check eqbank.ca (may differ from Personal Account)
accounts.debit_transactions: Standard debit transaction access

accounts.base_rate_note: Regular rate after promotional period
accounts.promo_details: 4.50% non-registered / 4.60% registered (TFSA/RRSP/RIF) for 153 days (5 months). New clients only (Client Number created Nov 13, 2025 – Mar 16, 2026). Promo signup deadline expired March 16, 2026 — existing promo holders continue earning until their 153-day period ends.
accounts.cdic_notes: CDIC insured via Tangerine Bank (Scotiabank subsidiary)
accounts.joint_account_notes: Joint accounts available for 2+ people. Any co-holder can transact independently without other holder's authorization.
features: Inactivity fee if no transactions for 12 months
new_features: Promo signup deadline expired March 16, 2026. Existing promo holders continue at promo rate for remainder of their 153-day period.
accounts.debit_transactions: No withdrawal fees. Free at Tangerine ABMs and all Scotiabank ABMs (3,500+ in Canada). Inactivity fee may apply if no transactions for 12 months.

accounts.base_rate_note: Regular rate
accounts.promo_details: 4.60% for 153 days for new clients. Signup window Nov 13, 2025 – Mar 16, 2026
accounts.debit_transactions: Standard debit transaction access

accounts.base_rate_note: Unverified
accounts.debit_transactions: Standard debit transaction access

accounts.base_rate_note: Estimated regular rate post-promo. Not prominently published by Simplii.
accounts.promo_details: 4.50% for 153 days (5 months) on new accounts. New clients only. Offer runs Feb 1 – Apr 30, 2026. Up to $100K balance.
accounts.joint_account_notes: Joint accounts available. Any co-holder can deposit/withdraw independently. No withdrawal limits or fees.
new_features: New promo: 4.50% for 5 months (Feb 1 – Apr 30, 2026) for new clients, up to $100K

verification.contradiction_note: Base rate of 0.30% is estimated — Simplii does not prominently publish post-promo rates.

accounts.debit_transactions: No withdrawal limits. No transaction fees. Free unlimited access.

accounts.promo_details: Unverified — per search results, may be expired
accounts.debit_transactions: Standard debit transaction access

features: No longer offered to new clients per search results
accounts.debit_transactions: Standard debit transaction access

accounts.base_rate_note: Up to 2.25% for Generation clients ($500K+ assets). Core: 1.25%, Premium: 1.75%. +0.50% DD bonus for Core/Premium.
accounts.cdic_partner: Multiple undisclosed CDIC-member institutions (up to $1M combined coverage)
accounts.cdic_notes: CDIC insured via multiple undisclosed partner institutions. Balances spread across partners for up to $1,000,000 combined coverage. Wealthsimple cannot disclose partner bank names due to contractual reasons. USD savings accounts are NOT CDIC covered.
accounts.joint_account_notes: Joint accounts available. Direct deposit boost applies to joint accounts. Joint account CDIC coverage is separate from individual account coverage.
features: Up to $1M CDIC coverage via multiple partner institutions
USD savings accounts not CDIC covered
new_features: Direct deposit bonus of 0.50% for Core and Premium tiers
accounts.debit_transactions: No transaction fees. Unlimited free Interac e-Transfers. Unlimited free bill payments.

accounts.base_rate_note: Tiered based on account tier (Core 1.25%, Premium 1.75%, Generation 2.25%)
accounts.cdic_notes: CDIC insured up to $100K per registered account
features: CDIC insured (up to $100K per registered account)
accounts.debit_transactions: Standard debit transaction access

accounts.base_rate_note: Up to 3.00% on Grow tier. Essentials: 2.25% (no fee), Build: 2.50% ($7.99/mo waived at $5K+), Grow: 3.00% ($12.99/mo waived at $20K+).
accounts.cdic_notes: CDIC insured via Concentra Bank. Deposits aggregated with any direct Concentra holdings.
accounts.joint_account_notes: Joint accounts available ONLY for married or common-law couples. Not available for friends, business partners, siblings, or parent/child.
features: Subscription fees waivable with balance thresholds
new_features: Dec 2025 restructure: moved from flat-rate HISA to tiered Neo Savings
Three subscription tiers: Essentials (free, 2.25%), Build ($7.99, 2.50%), Grow ($12.99, 3.00%)
accounts.debit_transactions: No transaction fees. Free unlimited withdrawals and transfers. Subscription fees apply for Build ($7.99/mo) and Grow ($12.99/mo) tiers — waivable with balance thresholds.

accounts.base_rate_note: Reduced from 2.25% to 1.25% on Dec 9, 2025 for users who did not migrate to Neo Savings.
accounts.joint_account_notes: Joint accounts available ONLY for married or common-law couples. Not available for friends, business partners, siblings, or parent/child.
features: Legacy product — no longer available to new customers
Existing holders earn 1.25% unless they migrate to Neo Savings
new_features: Rate cut from 2.25% to 1.25% effective Dec 9, 2025
Neo encourages migration to new Neo Savings tiered product
